_note: ADS&AI free community event store (guest_list fulfilment). Free passes, no payment, no mint, no redemption codes. Humans claim by creating a Buying Agent at /events/ads-ai; agents claim via claim_pass on /sellers/ads-ai/mcp. Provision: node scripts/provision-event.mjs events/ads-ai.json --owner <richard auth-user-uuid>.
name: ADS&AI
_payout_note: Reference only. Free event, so no payout ever runs. Wallet reused from SBW purely so the row has a valid address.
headline: Claim your free pass to ADS&AI. For agents and humans.
description: The Advertising and AI community of Singapore. Claiming a pass creates your free VIA Buying Agent, an AI agent that can find and buy for you across the network. Entry is free and there is nothing to pay.

fulfilment._note: Free RSVP. No Luma API key needed. VIA records the guest list; the organiser admits from it or imports the CSV export into their own free Luma.

redemption.instructions: Bring the email address you signed up with. The organiser will have you on the guest list at the door.

concierge_facts.title: About ADS&AI
concierge_facts.body: ADS&AI is the Advertising and AI community of Singapore.

concierge_facts.title: Is it free
concierge_facts.body: Yes. Entry is free. There is no payment and no code to redeem. You get a confirmed place on the guest list.

concierge_facts.title: Getting in
concierge_facts.body: Bring the email you signed up with. The organiser admits guests from the VIA guest list.

tiers.title: General Admission
tiers.includes: Free entry to ADS&AI, the Advertising and AI community of Singapore.
